/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -I/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/include -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -lomp CMakeFiles/perf_test_omp.dir/perf_test_omp.cpp.o -o perf_test_omp
